import sys

MOD = 998244353

def main():
    N = int(sys.stdin.read())
    s = str(N)
    len_s = len(s)
    
    # Compute pow(10, len_s * N, MOD) using modular exponentiation
    power = pow(10, len_s * N, MOD)
    
    # Compute (N * (10^{len_s * (N - 1)} + 10^{len_s * (N - 2)} + ... + 1)) % MOD
    # This is equivalent to N * (pow(10, len_s * N, MOD) - 1) // (pow(10, len_s, MOD) - 1)
    # But we need to compute it using modular inverse
    numerator = (power - 1) % MOD
    denominator = (pow(10, len_s, MOD) - 1) % MOD
    inv_denominator = pow(denominator, MOD - 2, MOD)
    result = (N % MOD) * (numerator * inv_denominator % MOD) % MOD
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
